tasks.label: Test C Backend
Test C Backend v2
tasks.command:
cd /home/antics/lateralus-lang && python -c "
from lateralus_lang.compiler import Compiler, Target
r = Compiler().compile_source('fn main() {\n    let x = 42\n    println(\"hello\")\n}', target=Target.C, filename='test.ltl')
if r.ok:
    print('=== C TRANSPILATION OK ===')
    # Show last 40 lines (skip preamble)
    lines = r.c_src.splitlines()
    for ln in lines[-40:]:
        print(ln)
else:
    print('FAIL')
    for e in r.errors[:5]:
        print(e.message)
" 2>&1

tasks.label: Make ISO
tasks.command:
cd /home/antics/lateralus-lang/lateralus-os && mkdir -p build/iso/boot/grub && cp build/lateralus.elf build/iso/boot/lateralus.elf && cat > build/iso/boot/grub/grub.cfg << 'GRUBEOF'
set timeout=2
set default=0
menuentry "LateralusOS v0.1.0" {
    multiboot2 /boot/lateralus.elf
    boot
}
GRUBEOF
